title: Evidence Bundle
description: The unit the Windows Governor publishes across the Secure Evidence Bridge and the Cloud Governor consumes. Append-only and hash-chained (mirrors the Execution Reality Engine raw store). Carries verified observations and capability statuses. No field may be fabricated; absent evidence is null/unknown, never defaulted. Secret VALUES never appear here — only secret presence-by-type (mirrors Collect-VajraEvidence.ps1 guarantee).

bundle_id.description: Globally unique id for this bundle.

host_fingerprint.description: Stable, non-secret host identifier (e.g. hashed machine id). No hostnames that leak PII if avoidable.

sequence.description: Monotonic per-publisher sequence number; gaps are detectable by the consumer.

produced_at.description: When the Windows Governor produced this bundle (its clock).

prev_bundle_hash.description: bundle_hash of sequence-1; null for the first bundle. Forms the chain.

signature.description: Optional detached signature over bundle_hash. Verifier trusts only known keys.

capability_statuses.description: Verified status per Windows capability at production time.

last_artifact_at.description: When this capability last produced its expected artifact; null = never/unknown.

evidence_ref.description: Pointer (path/hash) to the observed artifact, not the artifact's secret contents.

observations.description: Execution Reality Engine observation records (see ../../execution-reality-engine/schemas). May be empty when nothing was observable in the window (a legitimate, recorded state).

anomalies.description: Facts the Windows Governor flags for Cloud attention (e.g. stale collector, missing artifact). Observations, not conclusions.

self_declared_confidence.description: Overall evidence grade of this bundle. The Cloud Governor re-verifies; it never trusts this blindly.

secret_exposure_guard.description: Assertion that no secret values are included; secrets are reported by presence/type only.
